author: Ionut Cutilof
text: Este o cabana dotata cu tot ce ai nevoie pentru a te simti ca acasa, situata la 11km de Toplita intr un peisaj superb (drumul este lung dar poate fi parcurs cu orice masina). Noi am fost 14 persoane si a mai ramas o camera libera. Administratorul este un tip sper ok si ne a ajutat cu orice i am solicitat. Ciubarul si sauna au fost intotdeauna pregatite, lenjerii impecabile prosoape curate, bai aproape in fiecare camera... etc. Noi am fost in august dar seara era putin racoare pt copii astfel ca s a facut focul la centrala in fiecare seara. Peisajul este fantastic ... multa verdeata, flori.... recomand.
textEn: This is a cabin equipped with everything you need to feel at home, located 11km from Toplita in a superb landscape (the road is long but can be covered with any car). There were 14 of us and there was still a room left free. The host is a great guy who helped us with everything we asked. The hot tub and sauna were always ready, impeccable linen, clean towels, bathrooms in almost every room. We were there in August but evenings were a bit cool for the kids so the central heating was turned on every night. The scenery is fantastic... lots of greenery, flowers... I highly recommend it.

author: Carmen Corciovei
text: Superb!!! O locatie minunată, rupta de agitația si stresul cotidian, fără semnal la telefon, doar wifi la locație (ptr noi a fost super, nu am avut o problema cu asta) unde esti conectat doar cu natura iar relaxarea este maximă. Gazdele super ok, nu te deranjează cu nimic, nu stau acolo, in locatie ai de toate, nu îți lipseste nimic (in afara de mâncare si băutură, aici fiecare cum se organizeaza, in rest ai de toate). Noi am fost 6 familii cu copii, am stat 5 zile si ne-am simtit minunat, am mai fi stat vreo 2 zile dar avea rezervare.
textEn: Superb!!! A wonderful location, cut off from the daily hustle and stress, no phone signal — just WiFi on site (which was perfect for us, no complaints). You are connected only to nature and relaxation is total. The hosts are great, they don't bother you, they don't stay on site — everything is there for you, you lack nothing (except food and drinks, which you organise yourself — but everything else is provided). We were 6 families with children, stayed 5 days and had an amazing time. We would have stayed 2 more days but there was a booking.

author: Madalina Stancu
text: Este o cabana desprinsa din poveste! O vacanta frumoasa de Pasti in aceasta locatie. Cabana este foarte curata cu, camere spatioase si bucataria este dotata cu absolut tot ce este nevoie. Gazda foarte primitoare, ne-a asteptat cu prajituri, oua rosii, vin si palinca din partea casei. Nea Ilie, domnul care se ocupa cu focul la centrala, ciubar si sauna de nota 10. A fost extrem de disponibil. Va multumim pentru gazduire si va spunem cu totii ca ne-ati oferit nu doar cazare ci o experienta. vom reveni cu mare drag!
textEn: This is a cabin straight out of a fairytale! A beautiful Easter holiday at this location. The cabin is very clean, with spacious rooms and a kitchen stocked with absolutely everything you need. The host was very welcoming — she greeted us with pastries, red eggs, wine and plum brandy on the house. Mr. Ilie, who looks after the central heating, hot tub and sauna, deserves a 10/10. He was extremely available. Thank you for your hospitality — we all agree you offered us not just accommodation but a true experience. We will return with great joy!
